entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
Learn the sol-fa syllables, concepts of rhythm and meter, and how to read music. Video lessons are provided with the lesson plans.

Skills Focus: Rhythm, meter, sol-fa syllables and hand signs, ear test.

This topic is included in the following course(s): Music: Level 2

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content: Grade 3 students with no experience with sol-fa or sight-reading music may start with Level 1 or 2. Older students should start with Level 2.
